    C

    Card - Record Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards
    Represents a playing card with a rank and suit.
    Card(Rank, Suit) - Constructor for record class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Card
    Creates an instance of a Card record class.
    CARD_BACK - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils.Sprites
     
    CARD_COUNT - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
    The number of cards in a standard deck.
    CARD_PLACEHOLDER - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils.Sprites
     
    CardCombo - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards
    Represents a combination of cards in poker.
    CardCombo(List<Card>, List<Card>) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.CardCombo
    Constructor to create a CardCombo from two lists of cards.
    chatArea - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.graphics.PokerTableView
     
    chatInput - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.graphics.PokerTableView
     
    ChatMessage - Record Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game
    Represents a chat message exchanged in the poker game.
    ChatMessage(String, boolean) - Constructor for record class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.ChatMessage
    Creates an instance of a ChatMessage record class.
    chips() - Method in record class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.PlayerRepresentation
    Returns the value of the chips record component.
    ClientEndpoint - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network
    Handles the network communication from the client's side.
    ClientEndpoint(String, int, String, int) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network.ClientEndpoint
    Constructs a new ClientEndpoint with the given server information and player identity.
    ClientMain - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker
    Entry point for the client-side of the poker application using JavaFX.
    ClientMain() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.ClientMain
     
    close() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Closes all streams and the socket to the client.
    CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Suit
     
    compareTo(CardCombo) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.CardCombo
    Compares this CardCombo with another CardCombo.

    Button to connect to the game server.
